features.name: Monorepo Bootstrap
features.description: pnpm + Turborepo workspace with apps/api, apps/dashboard, and 4 shared packages installing and building cleanly
features.evidence: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile succeeds; pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build all green as of v1.0.0-alpha

features.name: Auth (JWT + OAuth)
features.description: Email/password auth with bcrypt, JWT access (15m) + refresh (7d) tokens, Google + GitHub OAuth, session cleanup, audit logging
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/auth/ — 91 unit tests pass; GitHub Actions e2e auth flow green

features.name: Organizations + RBAC
features.description: Multi-tenant orgs with owner/admin/member roles, cursor-based pagination, member management
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/organizations/ + dashboard Organizations page; pagination + role checks in middleware

features.name: Products CRUD
features.description: Product catalog with tier (trial/free/paid), max_devices, expires_at; cursor pagination, edit/delete dialogs
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/products/ + dashboard Products page; ConfirmDialog for destructive actions

features.name: Licenses CRUD
features.description: License issuance tied to product+org+user, status (active/expired/revoked), activation tracking
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/licenses/ + dashboard Licenses page with SearchToolbar + DataTable

features.name: Device Activation
features.description: UUID-based device registration, hardware fingerprint capture, max_devices enforcement, deactivation flow
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/devices/ + dashboard Devices page; SDK exposes activate() / deactivate() / verify()

features.name: API Keys
features.description: Per-organization API key issuance, hashing at rest, last-used tracking, revocation
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/api-keys/ + dashboard API Keys page

features.name: Audit Log
features.description: Append-only audit trail for all auth/org/license mutations; queryable by org with cursor pagination
features.evidence: apps/api/src/lib/audit.ts + database/migrations/ audit tables

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: Per-endpoint rate limits backed by Cloudflare KV, sliding window, 429 responses with Retry-After
features.evidence: apps/api/src/middleware/rateLimit.ts; covered in unit tests

features.name: Design System
features.description: Tokenized design system documented in DESIGN.md: CSS variables in :root/.dark, Tailwind v4 @theme inline re-bind, 20+ reusable components (StatusBadge, EmptyState, StatCard, PageHeader, ConfirmDialog, SearchToolbar, DataTable)
features.evidence: DESIGN.md 10.4K; apps/dashboard/src/components/ui/ contains all primitives; 40 dashboard unit tests

features.name: Dashboard UI (9 pages)
features.description: Overview, Organizations, Products, Licenses, Devices, API Keys, Documentation, Settings, Support — each with PageHeader, SearchToolbar, Skeleton loading, EmptyState
features.evidence: apps/dashboard/src/routes/ — 9 page modules; sidebar + topbar + command palette wired in App.tsx

features.name: Command Palette (Cmd+K)
features.description: Global navigation + theme toggle + sign-out; base-ui Dialog; arrow keys handled on input onKeyDown (base-ui Dialog traps events)
features.evidence: apps/dashboard/src/components/command-palette.tsx; fixed in CHANGELOG Unreleased

features.name: SDK JS Package
features.description: Standalone verification SDK for customer apps: install, configure with public key, activate/verify/deactivate license + device
features.evidence: packages/sdk-js/ — published as @keyra/sdk; Integration guide on dashboard Documentation page

features.name: CI Pipeline
features.description: 5-job GitHub Actions workflow: typecheck, api unit, dashboard unit, build, e2e; auto-deploys api to Cloudflare Workers on main
features.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml green; pnpm pinned to 10, Node 22

features.name: E2E Test Suite (Playwright)
features.description: End-to-end coverage of auth, orgs, products, licenses, devices — runs against local wrangler with auto-migrated D1
features.evidence: apps/api/e2e/ — 5 test files; auto-migration in scripts/ship-phase.sh

features.name: Agent Harness
features.description: Production harness: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, init.sh, scripts/ship-phase.sh, skills-lock.json
features.evidence: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, ship-phase.sh, init.sh, feature_list.json, feature-list.schema.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md all present and committed (0273af9); ./init.sh quick green (9/9 tasks, 141/141 unit tests); CLAUDE.md references the harness in Commands and Key Files sections; CI green

features.name: React Hook Form Integration
features.description: Replace direct useState form state across dashboard forms with RHF + zodResolver; align with shared-validation schemas
features.evidence: 62 dashboard tests + 28 shared-validation tests pass; 38 e2e pass; Edit Product dialog migrated to RHF + zodResolver; shadcn primitives (Calendar, Checkbox, Combobox, Field, RadioGroup, Switch) added; DateField uses Calendar in Popover

features.name: SDK npm Publish
features.description: GitHub Actions workflow to publish @keyra/sdk to npm on tagged release; provenance attestations; changelog generation from conventional commits
features.evidence: publish-sdk.yml triggers on sdk-v* tags + workflow_dispatch; npm publish --provenance (id-token:write perm); conventional-commit changelog generator + softprops/action-gh-release; package.json files/publishConfig/repository/license/keywords; README + LICENSE added

features.name: Audit S0 — Secret Rotation & Env Hygiene
features.description: Remove committed secrets from apps/api/.dev.vars; rotate JWT + Cloudflare token; .gitignore .dev.vars; .env.example; scripts/check-secrets.sh pre-commit guard
features.evidence: apps/api/.gitignore created; apps/api/.env.example lists all required env vars; apps/api/.dev.vars replaced with placeholders; scripts/check-secrets.sh wired into lefthook.yml pre-commit (parses staged diff, greps for AWS/JWT/Stripe/GitHub/Cloudflare patterns, exits non-zero on hit). Root .gitignore already had .dev.vars (line 5) so the file was never tracked in this checkout. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/audit-2026-06-18/s0-secret-rotation-and-env-hygiene.md (Closes P0-6)

features.name: Audit S1 — Org-Membership Middleware
features.description: Replace 31 inline SELECTs for org_members role check with requireOrgMember Hono middleware; set orgId + orgRole on context; typed helpers
features.evidence: apps/api/src/middleware/org.ts + lib/context.ts; 6 routers wired; 26 handlers refactored; 3 middleware tests + 95 API tests + 38 e2e all pass. Closes P2-1, unlocks S2/S3

features.name: Audit S2 — Products IDOR Fix
features.description: PATCH /products/:id adds AND organization_id = ? to UPDATE + post-update SELECT; cross-tenant write rejected with 404
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/products/update.ts: 3 SQL sites now include AND organization_id = ?. Closes P0-1

features.name: Audit S3 — Licenses Transfer IDOR Fix
features.description: POST /licenses/:id/transfer source UPDATE adds AND organization_id = ?; target-org ownership enforced (caller must be admin/owner of destination)
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/licenses/transfer.ts: source UPDATE has org filter; target-org membership check returns 404 on mismatch. Closes P0-2

features.name: Audit S4 — OAuth Hardening
features.description: OAuth state required; account-takeover fix (bind OAuth identity on email match or 409 OAUTH_ALREADY_LINKED); unified storeRefreshToken writes to KV with userAgent/ipAddress
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/auth/oauth.ts: (1) state mandatory — removed `if (state)` guard, now throws INVALID_STATE on empty; (2) existingByEmail SELECT now fetches oauth_provider+oauth_id; if existingByEmail.oauth_provider && !== provider → 409 OAUTH_ALREADY_LINKED; if !oauth_provider → UPDATE binds identity; (3) local storeRefreshToken deleted, replaced with persistSession from lib/sessions which writes session row + c.env.SESSIONS.put(session:<id>, 'active'). All 3 call sites hoist requestInfo + pass userAgent/ipAddress. 3 new tests in oauth.test.ts: state-required (rejects with 'Missing state parameter'), account-takeover (rejects with 'linked to github' 409), KV session written (asserts mockKV.put called with session:<id> + 'active'). API unit tests 98/98 pass (was 95; +3 new). Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/audit-2026-06-18/s4-oauth-hardening.md (Closes P0-3, P0-4, P0-5, P1-7)

features.name: Audit S5 — Public Endpoints Rate Limit
features.description: Per-endpoint rate limit on /verify, /activate, /auth/refresh; atomic per-(scope+ip+bucket) KV key; replaces global per-IP check-then-increment
features.evidence: apps/api/src/middleware/rateLimit.ts rewritten — key shape `rl:<scope>:<ip>:<bucket>`, throws AppError RATE_LIMITED 429 with Retry-After header. 5 existing callers + 3 new (verify/activate/refresh) migrated to new signature {window, max, scope, respectDevFlag}. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/audit-2026-06-18/s5-public-endpoints-rate-limit.md (Closes P0-7, P1-8, P1-9)

features.name: Audit S6 — Verify/Activate Scope Reduction
features.description: Public /verify returns {valid, expires_at, product_id, license_type} only; /activate strips feature_flags from response; full detail moved to authenticated channels
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/verify/index.ts — success body now {valid, expires_at, product_id, license_type}; dropped license_id, product_name, feature_flags. apps/api/src/routes/activations/activate.ts — success body now {activation_id, device_id, license_type, expires_at, activated_at}; dropped license_id, product_name, feature_flags. Activation test updated to assert new shape and explicitly assert dropped fields are undefined. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/audit-2026-06-18/s6-verify-activate-scope-reduction.md (Closes P0-8)

features.name: Audit S7 — Auth Flow Hygiene
features.description: OAuth callback requires OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI env; login runs dummy bcrypt on user-not-found; register sets email_verified=0 + email_verification_tokens table; org delete cleans up audit_logs
features.evidence: apps/api/src/routes/auth/oauth.ts: 3 sites throw OAUTH_NOT_CONFIGURED 500 when OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI / clientId / clientSecret missing. apps/api/src/routes/auth/login.ts: dummy bcrypt on user-not-found (real hash of '__keyra_dummy_pw__' inline). apps/api/src/routes/auth/register.ts: email_verified=0 on INSERT. database/migrations/0013_email_verification.sql: email_verification_tokens table + indexes. apps/api/src/routes/auth/verify-email.ts: 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED stub mounted at GET /auth/verify-email/:token. apps/api/src/routes/orgs/delete.ts: DELETE FROM audit_logs WHERE org_id=? before org_members. Test mocks: oauth.test.ts typo OAUTH_GITHUB_CLIENT_CLIENT_SECRET -> OAUTH_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET fixed. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/audit-2026-06-18/s7-auth-flow-hygiene.md (Closes P1-1, P1-2, P1-3, P1-5)
